title: crotalaria vestita
intro: Crotalaria vestita is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the 'Wedelia' or 'Small Butterfly Bush'. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The leaves and flowers of Crotalaria vestita have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and skin problems, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and enhanced skin health. In herbal preparations, Crotalaria vestita is often combined with other plants and used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
